description:
vLLM Iris Prefix Caching Benchmark Dataset
	

This dataset is specifically designed to test and benchmark the Automatic Prefix Caching feature in vLLM, using the technical announcement of vLLM Semantic Router v0.1 (Iris) as the shared context.

	
		
		Dataset Structure
	

The dataset contains 20 prompts. Each prompt consists of:

Shared Prefix: The technical overview of the vLLM Semantic R
